gt_sql: SELECT T1.Date - T2.CreationDate FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Zolomon'
pred_sql: SELECT julianday(T1.Date) - julianday(T2.CreationDate) AS "T1.Date - T2.CreationDate" FROM badges AS T1 JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE TRIM(T2.DisplayName) = 'Zolomon';
question: How long did it take the user, known by his or her display name 'Zolomon' to get the badge? Count from the date the user's account was created.
